name: Check Into Cash
description_short: Check Into Cash at 1924 Northwood Plz Dr, Franklin, IN 46131 is Mon-Fri 9:00 AM – 7:00 PM. Google reviewers rate the branch 5.0 stars across 661 reviews. Call +1 317-346-0067.
description_long:
Check Into Cash has operated for 30 years as a storefront-based emergency lending provider, with a physical location in Ferndale, Michigan at 749 East 9 Mile Road. The company specializes in short-term financial solutions designed for customers facing unexpected expenses or cash flow gaps between paychecks. Their primary lending products include payday loans (up to $600), installment loans with longer terms and lower payments, title loans secured by vehicle titles, and a Flex Line of Credit that allows borrowers to draw funds repeatedly within an approved limit. The Ferndale location operates Monday–Saturday with extended hours (8am–7pm weekdays, 9am–4pm Saturday), positioning itself as an accessible alternative to traditional banking during emergencies.

The company differentiates itself through multiple service offerings beyond lending. In addition to loans, Check Into Cash provides check cashing (including checks other providers reject), bill pay, Western Union money transfers, Green Dot Visa debit card accounts, and tax preparation services. Their application process is documented as straightforward, requiring proof of income, a government-issued photo ID, and checking account information. The Ferndale store is prominently located next to Apple Fritter Donut Shop and Allstate Insurance, making it locally identifiable. The company emphasizes speed and confidentiality, with approval-based same-day cash disbursement. They maintain state licensing in Michigan and publish retail fee schedules, indicating regulatory compliance.

What distinguishes Check Into Cash is their hybrid model combining physical storefront convenience with online lending capabilities. Unlike purely digital lenders, borrowers can walk into a location and receive cash same-day upon approval, appealing to those without online banking comfort or immediate cash needs. The breadth of ancillary services (check cashing, bill pay, tax prep, money transfers) positions them as a financial services hub beyond lending alone. Their 30-year operational history and multi-state presence suggest stability, though this is balanced against the inherent costs of maintaining physical retail locations.

Honestly, Check Into Cash operates in the high-cost emergency lending space. Payday loans and title loans typically carry APRs substantially higher than traditional credit (often 300%+ for payday loans), though this is disclosed as industry-standard and state-regulated. The company explicitly notes that loan amounts and eligibility depend on ability to repay, and that not all consumers qualify—responsible underwriting language, but also an acknowledgment that approval is not guaranteed. For consumers facing genuine emergencies with no alternatives, same-day cash availability is valuable; however, these products should be treated as genuine emergency-only tools, not ongoing financing solutions. The company's disclaimers about restrictions, rules, and fees applying suggest variable terms by location and product type, requiring careful review before commitment.
pros: Payday loans available up to $600 with same-day or next-day cash disbursement upon approval
Physical storefront in Ferndale allows walk-in applications and immediate cash pickup without online banking requirement
Multiple loan products including payday, installment, title loans, and Flex Line of Credit for different borrowing needs
Extended operating hours (8am–7pm weekdays, 9am–4pm Saturday) accommodate working customers
Ancillary financial services include check cashing, bill pay, Western Union transfers, and tax preparation at one location
State-licensed in Michigan with published fee schedules and disclosed underwriting criteria
30-year operational history and multi-state presence indicates longevity and established infrastructure
Application process documented as quick, easy, and confidential with straightforward requirements
cons: Payday and title loans are high-cost products with APRs typically exceeding 300%, making them expensive for borrowing
Approval is not guaranteed and depends on ability-to-repay assessment; eligibility criteria are vague and location-dependent
Limited loan amount for payday loans ($600 maximum) may be insufficient for larger emergencies
Physical location requirement for same-day cash limits convenience for customers unable to visit the Ferndale store in person
Fees, restrictions, and terms vary by location and product, requiring in-store consultation rather than transparent upfront pricing online
best_for: Employed individuals facing genuine one-time emergencies (car repair, medical bill) with ability to repay by next paycheck
Borrowers without access to credit cards or traditional bank loans who need same-day cash and prefer in-person service
Customers needing ancillary financial services (check cashing, bill pay, money transfers) alongside emergency lending
Vehicle owners with clean titles seeking collateral-based lending as an alternative to unsecured payday loans
diagnosis: Check Into Cash is best for employed individuals facing genuine, one-time cash emergencies who can repay within weeks and prefer in-person service. The main caveat is that payday and title loans are expensive (300%+ APR) and should only be used when no alternative exists; these are emergency products, not ongoing financing solutions, and borrowers must carefully review state-specific fees and terms before committing.
services: Installment loans with longer repayment terms
Title loans secured by vehicle titles
Flex Line of Credit with revolving access
Green Dot Visa debit card accounts
In-person loan applications with same-day approval
Online loan applications and account access
